personal.name: Farhan Sadeque
personal.title: Computer Science & Engineering Student
personal.subtitle: Building intelligent software solutions, AI-powered applications, and scalable systems while leading technical communities and innovative projects.
personal.bio: I am a passionate Computer Science & Engineering student, full-stack developer, and AI enthusiast at Independent University, Bangladesh. I specialize in building intelligent software solutions, computer vision applications, and scalable backend systems. As a co-founder of Reverie Inc. and an Executive of the IUB Debate Club, I combine technical engineering skills with strategic leadership and public relations experience to solve real-world problems.

education.details: Focusing on Software Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, and Computer Vision. Actively participating in national hackathons and leading student-driven technology initiatives.

projects.title: Pedi-Growth
projects.subtitle: AI Gait Analysis Platform
projects.description: An AI-powered pediatric gait analysis platform designed for healthcare professionals and researchers to screen and evaluate developmental gait abnormalities in children.
features: Real-time video skeleton pose estimation using advanced computer vision models
Intelligent early screening for common developmental delays and motor anomalies
Automated medical report generation with custom annotations
Interactive clinical dashboard for longitudinal patient tracking and analytics
Server-side video queue processing and deep biomechanical visual analytics

projects.title: Nirapotta
projects.subtitle: Disaster Communication OS
projects.description: A robust, lightweight disaster communication and coordinating operating system built to sustain emergency networking when traditional cellular infrastructure fails.
features: Decentralized mesh communication protocol utilizing local device networking
Emergency point-to-point and broadcast offline messaging capabilities
Real-time coordinate sharing and rescue request dispatch pipeline
Centralized coordinator control center for aid agencies and volunteer groups

projects.title: Agricultural Supply Chain System
projects.subtitle: IoT-Enabled Tracking & Monitoring
projects.description: An enterprise agricultural supply chain management platform integrating IoT sensors to secure grain storage, reduce food waste, and automate shipment logistics.
features: Real-time vehicle shipment tracking and live telemetry updates
Environmental GPS and temperature/humidity IoT sensor dashboards
Smart inventory alerts, automated storage logs, and shelf-life forecasting
Data-driven operational analytics powered by Power BI integrations

projects.title: Dengue Early Warning Platform
projects.subtitle: Predictive Disease Visualization
projects.description: A public health dashboard designed to predict outbreak vectors, manage volunteer response forces, and visualize dengue contagion density dynamically.
features: Machine learning models predicting outbreak probabilities based on regional weather
Citizen-driven incident reporting pipeline with visual mapping coordinates
Live density mapping using interactive geospatial maps and SVG visualizers
Voluntary coordination dispatch system for local vector-eradication initiatives

responsibilities: Organizing and coordinating large-scale national and club-level debate championships.
Managing institutional public communications, media partnerships, and press releases.
Directing volunteer groups, orchestrating marketing runs, and driving campus engagement.
Securing corporate sponsorship and leading liaison activities between the club and university administration.
Leading client-facing technical discussions and business strategy planning.
Overseeing the software development lifecycle for diverse custom application products.
Designing branding elements, marketing graphics, and high-fidelity Figma user flows.
Orchestrating digital outreach campaigns and maintaining active client client relationship pipelines.

achievements.title: Academic Technical Research
